titleStmt.title: SII 22.438: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 438. (A.R. No. 438 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE SAME WALL

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1269, Sarvajit, Tulā, śu. 5 (A.D. 1347, October 9, Tuesday). The inscription records the appointment of sixteen dēvaraḍiyār women for honorary service (mariyādi-kāṇiyāṭchi) in the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaram-Uḍaiyār by the temple authorities.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam Āyirattu Irunūṟṟu Aṟupattoṉpatiṉmel cellāniṉṟa sarvajitsamvatsarattu tulānāyaṟṟu śuddha pañcami nāḷ
koṅkumaṇṭalattu Oṭuvaṅkānāṭṭu tuṟavalūrāṉa nilagirisādhāraṇaṉ koṭṭaiyil Uṭaiyār tāntoṉṟiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil
tevaraṭiyārkku kāṇiyāṭci kuṭuttapaṭi vañci Ariyanācci nāyakanācci Ivaḷ makaḷ vaḷattuvāḻvittāḷ kaṟpakanācci piḷḷāṇṭāḷ pirāṭṭi Ivaḷ
makaḷ ciṅki civakāmacuntarinācci Ivaḷ makaḷ vāḻavantāḷ Ivaḷ taṅkai Ulakukkorutti Ivaḷ taṅkai vaḷattuvāḻvittāḷ Ulaki kāmāttāḷ
nācci nallāḷ Ākap per 10 6 Ipper patiṉāṟum kāṇiyāṭciyāka niṉṟu cevittu Inta Aṭaivile tiruvantikkāppum Eṭuttu paṇiyum muṟaiyu
ñceytu muṉṉaraṅkum Immariyātiyile Āṇṭumāṟi Eṟakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Immariyāti kāṇiyāṭciyākac candrādittavarai cevikkakkaṭa
varkaḷākavum Ippaṭik kuṭuttom Ikkoyilt tāṉattārom śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 22.438 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
